title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Q1 2025 Earnings Preview: Solar Innovations Amid Market Fluctuations
text: Enphase Energy announced Q1 2025 results on April 22, 2025, after market close. The company projects revenue between $340-$380 million, excluding $50 million in safe harbor revenue. Analysts anticipated earnings per share of $0.70, significantly higher than the prior year's $0.35. For fiscal 2025, Enphase is expected to report EPS of $2.05, more than double the fiscal 2024 result of $1.01. The company faces mixed geographic conditions with strong U.S. demand offset by European headwinds. Utility rate reductions in nations such as the Netherlands and France created obstacles for the company's expansion strategy. Enphase is broadening its portfolio with new microinverters and electric vehicle chargers, planning to deliver 1.2 million microinverters from U.S. factories during Q1. The newly launched IQ Battery 5P with FlexPhase offers scalable power systems compatible with both single- and three-phase configurations across international markets.
